reviews.review_description:
Due to hateful/abusive DMs I keep recieving from other users because of my reviews, im now editing my reviews to keep it short, 

It's too difficult, i never won a game on it, seriously its that brutal regardless of difficult selected, theres a fun game here however its buried under a oddly extreme difficulty,

Its barebones, misses a lot of features und is not fun in its current state. There is a lot of potential because badminton is a great vr sport. 
I also like the idea of minigames. 

Dear developers please don't give up!  For me its would be great if you add a mixed reality mode and let me play roomscale (let me disable autoteleport locomotion in settings).

Initially I left a two star review and planned to request a refund. The game was glitchy.  The worst problem was that bot matches didn't keep score and would end abruptly with the shuttlecock frozen on the ground in a red circle, although I could still move around and use the menus.

Much to my relief I've played the game several times since then and it works just fine.

My guess is that the game initialized something during the first run but didn't actually use it until the next time it launched. Hopefully it's just a random glitch.

The graphics look great, the game controls very well, and it's a lot of fun to play. It brings back fond memories of playing badminton in the back yard as a child.

The art direction is excellent! It's one of those games that makes me wish Nintendo would get into VR.

I'm hoping now that it's out for PSVR2 it'll get more coverage on YouTube, (that's how I discovered it), and sales will increase.

It must be frustrating launching a decent game in the Quest store then hoping someone will discover it buried under the avalanche of shovelware and Gorilla Tag knock offs.

Meta please remove all the garbage from the main store and add a trash can icon to keep the shovelware separated from the decent games.

The kids can root through the trash bin for their Gorilla Tag knock offs and the rest of us won't have to scroll past countless poorly drawn gorilla thumbnails in the store.

reviews.review_title: Good game needs more adult gameplay
reviews.review_description: The game is good to play. Physics are ok. Need some work. You can't really pull off any tippy tappy net shots that happen in badminton. I would also like an automatic move option. I like the art style but really needs more adult features. So far this game seems to be aimed at the younger gamer.  Dev's could you please add some more adult gameplay. First of all a normal badminton court in an arena as an option. I like the court's and location but it's all a bit cartoony. I would also like the ratchets to look a bit more realistic and an automatic move option. But otherwise well done so far.

reviews.review_title: good but whats with the Multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
I bought the game after watching reviews from YouTubers. It's a very good arcade badminton game. It's arcade because there is no real striking power. Even if you "hold" the racket against the shuttlecock, it flies over the net. But that's okay; you just need to know that in advance. This also makes the game very easy to pick up.

Graphics, sound, and gameplay are all good for a VR game (fun fact it seems there is also a switch version). However, there is one thing I'm wondering: is there really a working multiplayer mode, or is it "fake"? I never found any other players, and no games are shown in the past matches. Even worse: In the leaderboard, there's exactly one player with a game "ptibisciut". And this player is always shown in all the YouTube reviews when the leaderboards are displayed. If this is a bug, please fix it.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Multiplayer modes are not "fake"! :)
Unfortunately, with the way the store currently works, it's extremely difficult for many developers to be visible to players. But we do our utmost to motivate players to join us.

Thanks for your comment, it's really helpful :)

reviews.review_title: the game that keeps on giving
reviews.review_description:
The title of my review says it all. I went into this game expecting it to be another racket-type sports game but this is so much more than that! It's like badminton VR game meets Mario Party?? There's arcade mode, which allows you to have "super powers" while you play against either AI or friends, there's mini games that aren't even badminton anymore, but more like Mario Party mini games (super fun but quite challenging), and there's also tournaments, training mode, tons of different environments, lots of avatar customizations -- like seriously, the more you dig into this game, the more you find. It's like a treasure trove of features and game modes and all of it is incredibly polished. Really well done! 

By the time you read this, I should have a proper review up on my youtube channel if you want to see more. @vrwithjasmine on youtube :)
Pretty fun little game, but could use some features as auto run and left handed support fixed.
I liked this one -  had lots of different environments to choose from, and the mini games are challenging. It's a great way to stay active while playing in VR!

We played with my wife and kids. Perfect match if you want a game to play with friends.
It’s cool to be able to play at 4 players in a same match or minigame!

What a pleasure to play this game. It’s really colorful and easy to play!
I love the arcade mode with superpowers and the mini games.
